rationale: This statute governs comptroller marketing authority for a program fund. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Notwithstanding any other law, the comptroller or the comptroller's designee may enter into contracts or agreements and engage in marketing, advertising, and other activities to promote, market, and advertise the development and use of the program.
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
